texto: What life is this? Living in a world of hatred and lies, breathing the same air the dead breathed once, knowing we will wake up one day and find ourselves gone from time and space, and yet we still breathe the air without trembling from the thought.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Nour Zikra que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “What life is this? Living in a world of hatred and lies, breathing the same air the dead breathed…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre vida, philosophical, thought-provoking, com foco em thought-provoking.
